chapter_title.en: Age of Ignorance and Muhammad''s efforts to disseminate God''s message

text: ومن خطبة له (عليه السلام) يقرر فضيلة الرسول الكريم

en.sayed-ali-raza: About the condition of the people at the time of the Prophet’s proclamation and his actions to do with the dissemination of his message
